summary: Year-End Transfer (Yıl Sonu Devri) feature testing COMPLETE. All 14 backend tests passed, frontend UI verified working correctly. The feature allows admin users to carry over net cash balance from one year to the next.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/year-end-transfers returns list for admin (200)
Backend: GET /api/year-end-transfers without auth returns 401
Backend: POST /api/year-end-transfer creates transfer successfully (200)
Backend: POST /api/year-end-transfer calculates income/expense/net correctly
Backend: POST /api/year-end-transfer duplicate for same year rejected (400)
Backend: POST /api/year-end-transfer with invalid year rejected (400)
Backend: POST /api/year-end-transfer with missing year rejected (400)
Backend: POST /api/year-end-transfer without auth returns 401
Backend: Devir Bakiye transaction created with correct date (Jan 1 next year)
Backend: Transfer type is income for positive balance, expense for negative
Backend: Non-admin GET /api/year-end-transfers returns 403
Backend: Non-admin POST /api/year-end-transfer returns 403
Frontend: Login page password hint 'En az 8 karakter' visible on registration
Frontend: Year-End nav item visible in sidebar for admin only
Frontend: Year-End nav item NOT visible for non-admin (muhasebe) user
Frontend: Year selector buttons display available years from transactions
Frontend: Financial summary shows income, expense, and transfer balance
Frontend: Previous carryover ('Önceki Devir Bakiye') displayed correctly
Frontend: Start transfer button opens confirmation dialog
Frontend: Confirmation dialog shows warning, amount, target date
Frontend: Cancel button closes confirmation dialog
Frontend: Already transferred years show 'tamamlanmış' status with checkmark
Frontend: Transfer history section shows all past transfers
critical_code_review_comments: year_end.py correctly implements admin-only access via role check
Transfer calculation correctly handles income, expense, and previous carryover
Duplicate transfer prevention works via org_id + year unique check
Devir Bakiye transaction correctly dated Jan 1 of next year
Sidebar.jsx correctly filters Year-End nav item to admin-only
YearEndTransferPage.jsx has proper data-testid attributes for testing
Password validation updated to 8 chars minimum in LoginPage.jsx
seed_data_creation: Test transactions created for 2023: income ₺75,000, expense ₺50,000. Year-end transfer for 2023 completed with net balance ₺25,000 carried to 2024.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Year-End Transfer feature fully implemented and tested. Backend endpoints: POST /api/year-end-transfer (create), GET /api/year-end-transfers (list history). Both are admin-only (403 for non-admin). Frontend page at nav-year-end shows year selector, financial summary, confirmation dialog, and transfer history. Password minimum updated to 8 chars.

mocked_apis.Email sending: MOCKED - verification code returned in register response
